* C0620 · Descuento (extra #100) (Básico, Fórmulas)
       IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SOLVE-C0620.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       77  PRECIO            PIC S9(18)V9(9) COMP-2 VALUE 0.
       77  PCT            PIC S9(18)V9(9) COMP-2 VALUE 0.
       77  RESULT           PIC S9(18)V9(9) COMP-2.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           COMPUTE RESULT = PRECIO * (1 - (PCT / 100))
           DISPLAY RESULT
           GOBACK.
snippets.C0621:
* C0621 · FizzBuzz
       77 I PIC 9(9) VALUE 1.
       77 N PIC 9(9) VALUE 100.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > N
          IF FUNCTION MOD(I, 15) = 0
             DISPLAY "FizzBuzz"
          ELSE
             IF FUNCTION MOD(I, 3) = 0
                DISPLAY "Fizz"
             ELSE
                IF FUNCTION MOD(I, 5) = 0
                   DISPLAY "Buzz"
                ELSE
                   DISPLAY I
                END-IF
             END-IF
          END-IF
       END-PERFORM
       GOBACK.
